app.title: FIRE Calculators
app.description: Private, offline-first FIRE (Financial Independence, Retire Early) calculators

currentAge.title: How old are you?
currentAge.subtitle: This helps us understand your timeline

retirementAge.title: When do you want to achieve financial independence?
retirementAge.subtitle: Your target age for FIRE

currentSavings.title: How much do you currently have saved/invested?
currentSavings.subtitle: Include all retirement accounts and investments

annualIncome.title: What's your current annual household income?
annualIncome.subtitle: Before taxes

annualExpenses.title: What are your current annual expenses?
annualExpenses.subtitle: Or what you expect to spend in retirement

lifestyle.title: What lifestyle do you want in retirement?
lifestyle.subtitle: This impacts your target savings amount

workPreference.title: What's your ideal work situation after reaching FI?
workPreference.subtitle: How you want to spend your time

partTime.label: Part-Time Work
partTime.desc: Work for benefits or extra income

retireEarly.label: Retire ASAP
retireEarly.desc: Leave workforce as early as possible

lean.title: Lean FIRE
lean.reason: Your minimalist lifestyle and lower expenses make Lean FIRE achievable
lean.description: Achieve FI faster by living frugally. Requires less savings but demands lifestyle discipline.
benefits: Retire years earlier than traditional FIRE
Need less total savings to reach your goal

fat.title: Fat FIRE
fat.reason: Your desire for a comfortable lifestyle without compromise aligns with Fat FIRE
fat.description: Achieve FI while maintaining a luxurious or upper-middle-class lifestyle. Requires more savings but no sacrifices.
benefits: Travel, dining, and experiences without worry
Help family and leave a legacy

barista.title: Barista FIRE
barista.reason: Your interest in part-time work makes Barista FIRE an ideal stepping stone
barista.description: Blend portfolio income with part-time work. Reach FI faster while maintaining health benefits and social connections.

coast.title: Coast FIRE
coast.reason: Your timeline and age make Coast FIRE a strategic approach
coast.description: Save aggressively now, then let compound growth do the work. Perfect for young savers wanting flexibility.
benefits: Save hard early, then ease off
Compound growth does the heavy lifting

reverse.title: Reverse FIRE
reverse.reason: Your specific retirement age goal calls for a targeted savings strategy
reverse.description: Work backwards from your target age to calculate exactly what you need to save monthly.
benefits: Adjust timeline or savings as needed

savingsRate.title: Savings Rate Calculator
savingsRate.reason: Understanding your savings rate is the foundation for all FIRE paths
savingsRate.description: Your savings rate is the most important metric in FIRE. This calculator shows exactly how it impacts your timeline.
benefits: See direct impact of saving more

standard.title: Standard FIRE
standard.reason: The classic FIRE approach fits your balanced goals and timeline
standard.description: The traditional 25x expenses rule. A proven, balanced approach to financial independence.
benefits: Retire at traditional age or earlier

results.title: Your Recommended Path
results.subtitle: Based on your answers, here's the best FIRE strategy for you
results.whyWorks: Why this path works for you:
results.exploreOtherDesc: All FIRE paths can work depending on your circumstances. Feel free to explore multiple calculators to find what resonates with you.

standard.title: Standard FIRE Calculator
standard.description: The classic 25x expenses rule — calculate your "magic number" for full financial independence.

coast.title: Coast FIRE Calculator
coast.description: Find how much you need now so compound growth does the rest — then coast to retirement.

lean.title: Lean FIRE Calculator
lean.description: Achieve FI faster with a minimalist lifestyle — perfect for frugal-minded planners.

fat.title: Fat FIRE Calculator
fat.description: Retire without compromise — calculate FI while maintaining a comfortable lifestyle.

barista.title: Barista FIRE Calculator
barista.description: Blend part-time work with portfolio income — retire from corporate life earlier.

withdrawal.title: Withdrawal Rate Calculator
withdrawal.description: Test your portfolio's longevity — find your safe withdrawal rate for any scenario.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Gap Calculator
healthcare.description: Estimate healthcare costs between early retirement and Medicare eligibility.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator is for educational purposes only. It is not intended to be, and should not be construed as, financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Please consult with a qualified financial advisor, tax professional, or other appropriate professional.
